narrative:
Precinct Adams West & Gettysburg (precinct in Darke County) has 1,065 registered voters, with 49.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.2 percentage points.
